description: Identify scenic roads by performing a spatial selection. Using the global roads dataset (/home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_10m_roads.shp) and the parks dataset (/home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_10m_parks_and_protected_lands.shp), extract all road segments that intersect with parks or protected lands. Save the resulting features as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/scenic_roads.geojson.
